Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title.
- [ ] Tests updated (unit + integration where applicable).
- [ ] Architecture tests still green.
- [ ] If a default changed: ADR added/updated under `docs/adr/`.
- [ ] If user-visible: capability README + `when-to-leave-the-road.md` updated.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff.

## Breaking change?

- [ ] No.
- [ ] Yes — see ADR link above; include `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer in the
      squash-merge commit.
